name: Spin Rewriter
description: Custom PHP login at spinrewriter.com — login_token + checksum required
user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/149.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

steps.name: GET /log-in — scrape login_token and checksum hidden fields
GET /cp-account — subscription status from My Account HTML

notes: login_token and checksum are fresh hidden fields — scrape on each GET /log-in.
POST fields: email, password, login_token, checksum, return_path, browser_timezone, submit=1.
Success: redirect to /cp-account, /cp-home, or other /cp-* app pages.
FREE: paddle_button_js upgrade CTAs / pricing grid on /cp-account (no cancel link).
FREE_TRIAL: active trial markers with cancel link or days-left text.
After each successful login check, GET /action/log-out is called to avoid session pile-up.
